kept.text:
I spent my whole night working on my character.

Browsed Pinterest.
Remembered one of my favourite games.
Thought of creating my character from that perspective.

Best part? I built the character off of my pfp.

And the boss? Something you might not have thought of... keeping that for  final review. 

Constant tweaks. Countless failed attempts.  Steady Generations.

Glad to have a tool like @yapper_so to help out.
No multiple tool juggling or whatever.

Anticipate the movie.🔥

profile_bio.description: Full-scale Visual Storyteller  || Member @superteam || Building @Zela_payment || Contributing @campfireinvest || Creating for @yapper_so

quoted_tweet.text:
CREATORS CALL

Dear creators, we have received a huge number of works from you and are very happy with your participation. Building the lore together with you is not only a great pleasure but also meaningful work! 

Together, we are expanding the universe of @pvp_vibe, where soon we will be creating games with AI just as easily as you are now creating videos! 

Right now, by completing tasks during the pre-launch of the PvP Vibe platform (pvpvibe. com), you are earning valuable resources and NFTs that will affect your future earnings!

This time, we have prepared a wonderful task for you that you will definitely enjoy! So...

TALES OF VALDIR

EPISODE 1: THE BIRTH OF A LEGEND

SERIES 4: CREATORS KOMBAT

You have defeated the Boss in the Ziggurat, but another Creator interfered to steal your loot. He has challenged you to a fight, but the choice of weapon remains yours. In your hands is a magical interface that will help you create the space and the battlefield.

Your task is to create an epic FIGHTING GAME set in the medieval fantasy world of Valdir. You can use hands, feet, setting-appropriate weapons, and magic.

The battle must take place in a picturesque environment, and the background design will also be taken into account when evaluating your work.

You can create your own variations of the magical UI, and the quality of its design will also affect your final score.

1️⃣ Choose a faction for your hero: HORDE (orcs, undead, demons) or ALLIANCE (humans, elves, cat-people) and create them.

2️⃣ Choose your opponent: your favorite AI video creator, and turn them into a hero of the opposing faction.

3️⃣ Create a video consisting of two scenes:

- Scene 1: Use the magical interface UI from the post to CREATE THE GAME PROMPT. Be sure to spend 1,000 rubies.

- Scene 2: Create the game: a third-person FIGHTING game featuring your hero against the other creator's hero. Naturally, you must win.

4️⃣ Publish the video with a quote repost of this contest and challenge a creator to a duel.

5️⃣ Mandatory: Include the hashtags #pvpvibe #aivideo #zargates #ai, tag the services you used to create the video, and fill out the GOOGLE FORM. ⬇️

Prize pool: $1,000 will be shared among the 10 best works. Outstanding results will be rewarded separately.

Also, each participant will receive an NFT ZarGates scratch card with a drop from $10 to $5,000 credited to your PvP Vibe deposit.

The best heroes will remain in our lore forever.

Deadline: May 7 at 11 PM UTC.

For fighting reference, check out the work of one of our creators in the reply. 

Good luck and a creative victory!
